name: godex
description: Go backend engineering guidance for Codex agents building production services.

interface.longDescription: Godex is an independent Codex plugin for Go backend engineering. It guides agents through idiomatic package structure, net/http or gin services, config loading, testing, pgx, Redis, Kafka, OpenTelemetry, Swagger docs, Wire, mockery, Taskfile workflows, and production readiness.
defaultPrompt: Use Godex to review this Go service.
Use Godex to plan a Go backend change.
Use Godex to improve Go test coverage.
